name: pict-section-prompteditor-example-prompt-workshop
description: Prompt Workshop - craft typed prompts, curate weighted word lists, generate and download batches

scripts.build: npx quack build && npx quack copy

author: steven velozo <steven@velozo.com>

ExampleApplication.Title: Prompt Workshop
ExampleApplication.Summary: The full prompt editor section in memory: typed prompts with segments, weighted word list matrices, the {~WordListEntry:~} expression, inline preview with reroll, batch generation, and zip download.
